description: Color photograph taken inside a police department conference or briefing room. Five men stand at the front of a carpeted room with a large faux-wood conference table and black leather rolling office chairs in the foreground; a plastic water bottle sits on the table. On the back wall hangs a large embossed 'POLICE' seal or badge emblem. To the left stand an American flag and a Missouri state flag on poles. A wall-mounted flat-screen TV on the right shows a graphic with text partly legible: 'This suspect... and a sho...', 'Contact...', and a number ending '...811'. The men include a clean-shaven man in a dark suit jacket and blue collared shirt, and four others in tactical or plainclothes law-enforcement attire (olive-green combat shirts, tactical pants with knee pads, sidearms, one in camouflage with a 'POLICE' patch). The faces of four of the men are digitally blurred or whited out. There is no headline, slogan, or added text overlaid on the image. Per the tweet, it shows Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons addressing teams in Dallas before a trafficking enforcement operation. The photo has natural interior lighting.
notable_text: On-screen TV (background, partial): 'This suspect... and a sho...'; wall emblem reads 'POLICE'. No designed slogan overlay.
